# Purchase Default Terms Conditions

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:3086201faf90316443e516aa0c5aac62e98721721521ce65fcd7f97ee3f6d829

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows purchase default terms & conditions from Suppler or
Company

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Go to Purchase Settings
2. Enable Default Terms & Conditions
3. Set Default Terms & Conditions
4. Set Terms & Conditions in Suppler

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go do Purchase App
2. Create a New Purchase/Quotation Order

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/purchase-workflow/issues).

If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/purchase-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20purchase_default_terms_conditions%0Aversion:%2017.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).
